headline: Diamond Hill Select Fund Q1 2026 Portfolio Update
summary: Broad US equity markets declined during the quarter, with the Russell 3000 falling 3.96%, while performance across the cap spectrum was mixed. Read more here.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Aon, Raises Price Target to $360
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   maintains Aon (NYSE:AON) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $355 to $360.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Arthur J. Gallagher, Aon, Brown and Brown and Willis Towers Watson Public
summary: Insurance brokerage stocks AJG, AON, BRO and WTW may gain from rising insurance demand, M&A activity and tech-driven efficiencies.
